zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Dunham於1430年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir Gregory Dunham48歲，母親Elizabeth Marguage45歲。他於1450年之前與Margaret Stafford在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾加姆斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1463年6月3日在英國斯塔福爾斯托可--特倫特享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Dunham于1430年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Sir Gregory Dunham48岁，母亲Elizabeth Marguage45岁。他于1450年之前与Margaret Stafford在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾加姆斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1463年6月3日在英国斯塔福爾斯托可--特倫特享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dunham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Dunham (Norfolk, Nottinghamshire, Cheshire). Most are named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + hām ‘homestead’. A place in Lincolnshire now known as Dunholme appears in the Domesday Book as Duneham and this too serves as a source of the surname; here the first element is probably the Old English personal name Dunna. Dunham is often difficult to tell apart from Downham .
History: John Dunham (1590–1668) was a Puritan linen weaver who came to Plymouth, MA, via Leiden, the Netherlands, in 1633. He had many prominent descendants.

variants.name: Downham
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Downham in Cambridgeshire, Essex, Norfolk, Suffolk, and Lancashire, and perhaps also from Downham, Northumberland, and Downholme, North Yorkshire, though no evidence has been found for these. The names from Lancashire and Northumberland arise from Old English dūn, dative plural dūnum ‘(at) the hills’, while the others come from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Dunham was born in 1430, in Devon, England, his father, Sir Gregory Dunham, was 48 and his mother, Elizabeth Marguage, was 45. He married Margaret Stafford before 1450, in Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 3 June 1463, in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Dunham est né en 1430, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gregory Dunham, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Marguage, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Stafford avant 1450, à Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 juin 1463, à Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Dunham 1430 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gregory Dunham 48 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Marguage 45. Er hat vor 1450 in Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. Juni 1463 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Dunham è nato il nel 1430 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Gregory Dunham, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Marguage, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Stafford prima del 1450, nel Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 giugno 1463, nel Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Dunhamが1430年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Gregory Dunhamは48歳，母Elizabeth Marguageは45歳であった。1450年以前にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアガムストンでMargaret Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1463年6月3日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアストケ-オン-トレントで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Dunham(이)가 1430년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gregory Dunham(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Marguage(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1450년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 갬스턴에서 Margaret Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 6월 3일 영국 스태퍼드실르 스토케--트렌트에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England: Gamston, Snotengaham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Dunham nasceu em 1430, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gregory Dunham, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Marguage, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Stafford antes 1450, em Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de junho de 1463, em Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Dunham родился в 1430 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Gregory Dunham было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Marguage, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Stafford перед 1450 г. в местности гамстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 июня 1463 г. в местности стоке-он-трент, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Dunham nació en 1430, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Gregory Dunham, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Marguage, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Margaret Stafford antes de 1450, en Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de junio de 1463, en Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años.
